title: CraneMod-ZombieZ
description: Minimap, interactive map with all skull zones, bosses, and real-time player positions — for the ZombieZ server on Rinaorc.
body:
# CraneMod ZombieZ **CraneMod ZombieZ** is a **client-side** Fabric 1.21.4 mod that enhances your experience on the **ZombieZ server (Rinaorc)**. An interactive map, a minimap, and the real-time position of other players using the mod. --- ## ✨ Main features --- ## 🎮 How to use Press **`M`** (rebindable in key options) to open the menu: - **Maps** → opens the full HTML map in your browser - **Information** → mod info & updates - **Complete guide / Video guide / Official wiki** → links to community resources --- ### 🗺️ Interactive HTML map - The **50 skull zones** displayed with their exact positions (X, Y, Z) - All **bosses** with their respawn zones - **Real-time position** of your character on the map - **Other players' positions** (those using the mod) with their skin head and HP - **Waypoints**: visible in-game to help you find each skull ### 📍 In-game minimap - Pixel-art minimap directly in the HUD - **Movable and resizable** via the menu (M key) - Shows skulls, bosses and other players around you - Player head, directional arrow, and chunks rendered in real time ### 🎯 Quality of life - **Right-click on a skull** → it disappears from the minimap (handy to track those already collected) - **Active waypoints HUD** with distance and directional arrow - **Promo banner** displayed automatically in certain NPC GUIs - **`rinaorc.com` automatically added** to the top of your server list on first launch --- ## 🔒 Privacy info The mod sends your position (X, Y, Z, dimension, HP, mod version) to an HTTP relay **only when you're playing on Rinaorc.com**, so other mod users can see you on the map. You can **disable position sharing** at any time in `config/maps-cranes-zombiez.json` by setting `sharePositionOnRinaorc: false`. You'll then be invisible to others and won't see them either. No data is shared outside the Rinaorc server. --- ## 💬 Support / Bugs / Suggestions

Join the Discord to report a bug, suggest improvements, or stay updated on releases: **[discord.gg/kMhawK9UmW](https://discord.gg/kMhawK9UmW)**
